title: dioscorea fodinarum
intro: Dioscorea fodinarum, also known as the lesser yam, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to help reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Dioscorea fodinarum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Dioscorea fodinarum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally or applied topically to the skin.
